description: Clidrive is a Spanish online platform for buying and selling used vehicles, operating both as a direct seller in some cases and as an intermediary between private parties in others. It serves buyers and sellers across mainland Spain and the Balearic Islands.
summary: Clidrive exposes a public MCP server at `https://backend.clidrive.com/intelligence/mcp` and public web/markdown vehicle catalogue pages; no developer-authenticated API, GraphQL API, or CLI was found.
